mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `seo_url` (url, type, ref_id, lastmod, is_indexable, priority, changefreq, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{r.url}, #{r.type}, #{r.refId}, NOW(), #{r.isIndexable}, #{r.priority}, #{r.changefreq}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE type = VALUES(type), ref_id = VALUES(ref_id), lastmod = NOW(), is_indexable = VALUES(is_indexable), priority = VALUES(priority), changefreq = VALUES(changefreq), updated_at = NOW()
